title: Dataset - Membrane-localized magnetic hyperthermia promotes intracellular delivery of cell-impermeant probes
author: Idiago-López, Javier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data regarding the MNP surface temperature estimation, magnetic measurements, and qPCR data for the HSP expression.  
  The data set is related to the article "Membrane-localized magnetic hyperthermia promotes intracellular delivery of cell-impermeant probes", submitted to Nanoscale
steps_raw:
Data regarding the MNP surface temperature estimation, magnetic measurements, and qPCR data for the HSP expression.  
  The data set is related to the article "Membrane-localized magnetic hyperthermia promotes intracellular delivery of cell-impermeant probes", submitted to Nanoscale
